title: Accept a task with a form or other possibility?
excerpt: We work with freelancers and we want to give the possibility to accept a task by an accessible form “link” or by another means, once the task is accepted “assigned” the freelancer can access all the details of his task

posts.author: David1988 (David Garcia)
posts.cookedHtml: We work with freelancers and we want to give the possibility to accept a task by an accessible form “link” or by another means, once the task is accepted “assigned” the freelancer can access all the details of his task

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @David1988 !

Welcome to the monday communities!

There is not really a “direct” way to implement this on monday, though it is possible with some workarounds ( match automations and separate boards). This would require some hours to build,so should you need any professional assistance please feel free to contact us at info@thespelas.com .

Best,
Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi@David1988,

you can use Make in which you can create a rule that automatically assigns tasks to freelancers when they meet certain criteria. For example, you could create a rule that automatically assigns a task to a freelancer when they submit a proposal.

For further implementation details kindly connect us:
MSquare Support
Visit us here
Youtube Channel
